title: Quality Indexation Map — Full URL Classification

A_MONEY_CORE.description: High-value pages we want indexed and ranked — the 8 primary money pages
A_MONEY_CORE.internal_links: Growing — 7-12 blog links each from calculator-blog-links.ts
A_MONEY_CORE.impressions: Mixed — investment-return 47, retirement 11, tax-calc 81, most unknown at page level
A_MONEY_CORE.action: BOOST — add support-ring links, improve trust/UX elements, concentrate all authority here

B_SUPPORTING_REAL_PAGE.description: Useful guides, blogs, and decision pages that support money pages
B_SUPPORTING_REAL_PAGE.impressions: Varies — top blog has 124 imp, most have <20
B_SUPPORTING_REAL_PAGE.action: LINK TO MONEY PAGES — add contextual links upward, improve quality of top performers

C_LINKABLE_ASSET.description: Widgets and data assets that can earn external citations
C_LINKABLE_ASSET.action: MAINTAIN — keep in sitemap, promote from money pages, data assets TBD

D_INDEXED_LOW_VALUE.description: Indexed but weak pages with low impressions, thin content, or minimal unique value
likely_sources: thin tool variants (225 in sitemap, many may be thin)
older blog posts with no impressions
D_INDEXED_LOW_VALUE.internal_links: Some linked from lists and navigation
D_INDEXED_LOW_VALUE.action: REDUCE INTERNAL LINKS — stop promoting, link upward to money pages, do not noindex yet

E_DISCOVERED_LOW_VALUE.description: Discovered by Google but not indexed — likely low-value or duplicate
E_DISCOVERED_LOW_VALUE.action: SAMPLE FIRST — then reduce links to D/E/F, do not promote

F_HISTORICAL_404.description: Old URLs Google remembers but no longer exist — not in current sitemap
F_HISTORICAL_404.action: IGNORE — will naturally decay, no action needed

G_INTENTIONAL_NOINDEX.action: KEEP — intentional and correct, verify no accidental money page noindex

H_DUPLICATE_OR_CANONICALIZED.description: Pages with canonical handling to parent page
H_DUPLICATE_OR_CANONICALIZED.action: KEEP — canonical working correctly, no action needed

key_insight: QFINHUB has ~3,800+ known URLs but Google only trusts 286. The site needs to look like a focused finance calculator authority, not a broad programmatic SEO site. Concentrate everything into A/B pages, reduce promotion of D/E pages.
execution_priority: 1. BOOST A (money pages) — add support-ring links, trust elements
2. LINK B→A (supporting → money) — add upward contextual links
3. REDUCE D/E — stop adding links to weak pages, link them upward
5. IGNORE F/G/H — historical/blocked, no action needed
